---
description: Generate release notes for VS Code Insiders based on GitHub issues and PRs.
argument-hint: Provide the release version, milestone name, and label to filter issues.
agent: agent
---

Generate Insiders release notes by following the **Insiders Release Notes** section in the [release-note-writer skill](../skills/release-note-writer/SKILL.md).

Pass along the release version, milestone name, and label provided by the user.
